title: desmanthus pumilus
intro: Desmanthus pumilus, also known as dwarf fleabane, is a small shrubby perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Desmanthus pumilus include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Desmanthus pumilus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
